creator: gwarf@gwarf.org
text:
Le 13/01/09 à 20:42, Edwin Groothuis téléscripta :
> Maintainer of sysutils/pydf,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/130513 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/130513

This upgrade is okay, sorry to not have done this before :).

Regards,
Baptiste
